user_goal_stage: The user is currently playing the daily Juxtastat game. One question has been answered (indicated by the green box), and there are four more to go to complete the daily set of five questions.

actions.reasoning: To progress in the Juxtastat game, I must select one of the two geographical regions provided as an answer to the question. I am choosing the first option.
actions.user_detail_query: Which region should I select as having a higher % of low income people: Montréal Territory or Ottawa CDR?
